assumption_text: Encode 'more than 80 civilians' conservatively as a floor of 80.
rationale: This avoids false precision while preserving the documented minimum.

assumption_text: Keep the UN's late-September east/west Aleppo figures in unknown-status because the retained wording says 'people', not civilians only.
rationale: Project rules forbid silently converting such totals into civilian deaths.

assumption_text: Use 275,000 as a cautious East Aleppo civilian exposure proxy across the final-assault row.
rationale: It is the clearest retained siege-population figure, but it is only a rough starting point under active displacement.
